name: Andrew Jarson
cooked: Damn, he’s being hella misleading in general then. But yea, I think you’re absolutely right. Got mine about a week ago, your videos helped a lot. I think it’s an insanely cool and inspiring device. MIDI over TRS is weird, you almost have to beat match no matter what, using the scrub knob, but once it locks in it works. I’m still shocked at how well bluetooth works, and that they didn’t implement that into the TP-7. It would honestly make it an instant buy for me.
